tagline: Preview extraction, OCR ingestion, and sharper retrieval.

features.title: Dry-Run Fact Extraction
features.summary: Preview the facts a document yields — and tune your retain mission before you store.

example.content: Priya left Stripe to start Verdana, a climate-fintech startup, and is hiring two backend engineers. She loves bouldering and just adopted a cat named Pixel.

facts: Priya left Stripe to start Verdana, hiring two backend engineers.
Priya left Stripe to start Verdana, hiring two backend engineers.
Priya loves bouldering and adopted a cat named Pixel.

example.caption: Pass a candidate retain_mission (or any retain param), preview the facts, repeat — all without storing. The fast loop for dialing in a bank.

features.title: Document OCR
features.summary: Point MarkItDown's image OCR at a vision LLM — turn scans & photos into memory.

example.code:
# MarkItDown already reads PDF/DOCX — 0.8.3 OCRs images via a vision LLM
HINDSIGHT_API_FILE_PARSER_MARKITDOWN_OCR_ENABLED=true
HINDSIGHT_API_FILE_PARSER_MARKITDOWN_OCR_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini
example.before: receipt-042.jpg · photo of a printed receipt
example.caption: MarkItDown handled PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX already; 0.8.3 adds an OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint, so images & scans become memory.

features.title: Sharper Retrieval
features.summary: Pinpoint recall with exact tag matching — now surfaced everywhere.

example.setupLine: A memory tagged [user:alice, team:eng] — tags_match decides which filters return it:

modes.name: any
modes.answers: any of the filter tags overlap

recalls.result: no match — it also carries team:eng

example.caption: Sharper across 0.8.3: exact tag matching, better Chinese time-expression parsing, and recency that falls back to effective time when a timestamp is missing.

groups.label: operational
items: Parallel tenant migrations — faster schema upgrades
Leaner API responses — null fields omitted

groups.label: fixes

items.text: Critical: retain-chunking fix — oversized documents no longer lose content on ingest

items: LiteLLM timeout hard-cap — no more indefinite hangs
Output sanitization — strips malformed tags & unclosed blocks
